aba.entry: xi0 aba “(dialectal) elder sister, mother” < ef1 *ap-pa “mother, elder sister, aunt” in sp7.

abece.entry: xi0 abece “alphabet” < a combination of the name of the first three letters in Turkish alphabet; xi0 a “alpha”, xi0 be “beta” and xi0 ce “gamma”.

yaman.entry: xi0 abece “alphabet” < a combination of the name of the first three letters in Turkish alphabet; xi0 a “alpha”, xi0 be “beta” and xi0 ce “gamma”.
